title: I am placin' blocks 'cause I'm in Minecraft
description:
Replaces the 'Wet Hands' song in-game to the Jack Black cover by RainingKetchup + some other fun Jablinski related changes.

This version has swear words.
body:
This Resource Pack plays the "i am placing blocks" Jack Black song, Spawns Jablinski Zombies, Places Jack Black Paintings & Retextures players to Jack Black Steves.

This version has Swearing.

By CADAVER / CADAVERPILLED

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/9rQW0tI-IfY" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>
